headline: Union Pacific CEO Jim Vena on proposed merger with Norfolk Southern, tariffs impact on supply chain
summary: CNBC’s Frank Holland and Union Pacific CEO Jim Vena join 'Squawk Box' to discuss the status of the company's proposed merger with Norfolk Southern, impact of tariffs on supply chain, and more.
